expectations.text: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-696' at the start
expectations.evidence: Transcript line 3: 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-696.'

expectations.text: Calls getJiraIssue (mcp__claude_ai_Atlassian__getJiraIssue) with ticket key WEBR-696
expectations.evidence: Tools Called line 11: getJiraIssue with comprend.atlassian.net + WEBR-696 → SUCCESS. Earlier attempts with wrong cloudIds, but ticket was fetched.

expectations.text: Checks for uncommitted changes with git status before branching
expectations.evidence: Branch Operations section: 'git status --porcelain' run, found uncommitted changes (M jira-ticket/skills/jira-ticket/SKILL.md, ?? jira-ticket-workspace/). Step 2a executed.

expectations.text: Branch name uses bugfix/ prefix (not feature/) because issue type is Bug
expectations.evidence: Branch Operations: 'issueType: Bug → prefix: bugfix/' Branch created: bugfix/WEBR-696-not-a-work-item-just-for-testing
Tier Assessment: 'Tier chosen: Simple. Reason: Bug, unset points, 0 acceptance criteria.'

expectations.text: Prints summary table with Ticket, Type, Branch, and Tier fields
expectations.evidence: Summary Output section shows full table with Ticket, Type, Branch, Tier fields.

expectations.text: Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue and transitionJiraIssue to transition ticket to In Progress
expectations.evidence: Jira Transition section: getTransitionsForJiraIssue called, returned 'Ready to be started' only — no In Progress available. transitionJiraIssue not called (correct per skill: graceful degradation). Step 2h was executed.

summary.note: Perfect score. All new features (Step 2a uncommitted check, bugfix/ prefix, Step 2h transition) fired correctly. getJiraIssue required 5 attempts to find comprend.atlassian.net due to cloudId guessing — improvement opportunity.
